name: Chicken Florentine Wrapped in Pastry
recipeIngredient: Package Pepperidge Farm® frozen puff pastry, (2 sheets) (17 ounces)
Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well drained (about 10 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw puff pastry sheets at room temperature for 30 minutes.
2. Mix egg and water in a bowl; set aside.
3. Preheat oven to 400°F.
4. Pound chicken between two sheets of waxed paper to a thickness of 1/4 inch, then cut each breast half in half.
5. Coat the chicken with flour, salt, and pepper.
6. In a medium skillet over medium-high heat, heat olive oil. Add chicken and cook until browned. Set aside and cover; refrigerate for 15 minutes.
7. In the same pan, mix spinach and ground nutmeg, then cook for 5 minutes. Set aside.
8. Unfold one puff pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface. Roll into a 14-inch square and cut into 4 squares (7 inches each).
9. Place chicken in the center of each square. Spread 1 teaspoon mustard and top with about 1/4 cup spinach mixture.
10. Brush edges of each square with egg mixture.
11. Cover each pastry square with another pastry square, pressing edges to seal.
12. Brush remaining squares with egg mixture.
13. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown.
